hero.heading:
A new kind of
everyday essential.
hero.body: The Tarrant. As intended. Resolved by design. Ready by intention. Every tool. One carrying system. Three colourways.

brandStatement.heading:
Not a bag. Not a case.
A new category.
brandStatement.body: Slim, deliberate, and precisely engineered. The Tarrant — Origin holds every essential a modern professional carries, and turns over to become a flat working surface. Made for those who would rather own one right thing than three adequate things.

items.title: Full-Grain Leather
items.body: Hand-stitched with contrast thread detail on darker colourways. Heritage material, modern precision.

items.title: Moulded Pockets
items.body: A precision-engineered carry system. Each compartment shaped for a specific object. Not just stitched leather.

items.title: Dual Purpose
items.body: Carry organiser. Work surface. One object, two modes. Flips over to become a flat, considered workspace.

items.title: D-Ring Hardware
items.body: Carry strap attachment for on-the-move use. Confirms this travels — from desk to meeting to city.

items.title: Slim Profile
items.body: Architectural lines. Looks like it holds nothing but holds everything. The opposite of bulk.

items.title: Holds Everything
items.body: Laptop, stylus, phone, AirPods, charger, keys, glasses. One pocket system. Zero compromises.

craftsmanshipPreview.heading:
The making is
the meaning.
craftsmanshipPreview.body: Self-taught across painting, moulding and leatherwork, everything made under the Tarrant name starts the same way: with curiosity about what a material could become in the hands.

items.quote: Customer review placeholder. Real testimonial to be provided by the client.
